channel.title: Advanced Mechanix — Engineering Insights
channel.description: Insights on electrical drafting, BIM modeling, solar permitting, arc flash safety, and engineering outsourcing from the Advanced Mechanix team.

item.title: The True Cost of Chasing Timesheets in Engineering Teams
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: Admin drag, payroll errors, and billing leakage: a worked costing of the informal timesheet department inside every engineering firm, and the three ways to shut it down.

item.title: How to Brief an Offshore Drafting Team
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: The eight-part briefing pack, a 45-minute kickoff agenda, and the RFI protocol that gets the first offshore drawing issue back right instead of on revision three.

item.title: The IEEE 1584 Arc Flash Calculation, Explained Step by Step
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: The full pipeline from single-line to arc flash label: arcing current, clearing time, electrode configurations, the reduced-current check, and what changed from 2002 to 2018.

item.title: Case Study: A 38-Site Arc Flash Program for a Grain Network
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: IEEE 1584-2018 studies refreshed across an anonymized Australian grain network of 38 receival and port sites in nine months, staged around the harvest window.

item.title: Case Study: The Timesheet Desk We Run In-House
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: Before timesheet management was a service, it was our own back office: how Advanced Mechanix tracks, validates, and bills time for a distributed engineering team.

item.title: The Complete Guide to Outsourcing Electrical Drafting (2026)
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: A 2,500-word buyer's guide for engineering managers, BIM leads, and procurement officers evaluating offshore drafting vendors. Standards, security, SLAs, pricing benchmarks, seven red flags.

item.title: What Is a Single-Line Diagram?
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: An illustrated engineer's guide to the most-referenced drawing in electrical engineering. Symbols, standards, reading conventions, and common mistakes.

item.title: What Is NFPA 70E? Arc Flash Safety Explained for Engineers
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: Plain-English guide to the US electrical safety standard. How it differs from NEC, arc flash risk assessment, PPE categories, employer documentation obligations.
